resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def findMaxK(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        num_set = set(nums)
        max_k = -1
        for num in nums:
            if -num in num_set and num > max_k:
                max_k = num
        return max_k
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a set to store the input array for efficient lookups. It then iterates over the array to find the maximum positive integer k such that -k exists in the set. This approach has a high efficiency due to the use of a set and a single pass through the array.
